home.title: Maik's Quiz
home.subtitle: Real-time Quiz Buzzer
home.nameRequired: Please enter your name to continue.
home.spectatorHint: Spectators join via the secure link from the Quiz Master

roomPage.kicked: You have been kicked from the room.

player.waitingForOptions: Waiting for the Quiz Master to set the options...
player.waitingForRange: Waiting for the Quiz Master to set the range...

quizmaster.noTeamsYet: No teams yet. Add one above.

tooltips.resetRoom: Reset all buzzes, answers, and player states for a new round
tooltips.modeBuzzer: Players race to press the buzz button first
tooltips.modeMC: Players select from predefined answer options
tooltips.modeGuess: Players enter a number within a given range
tooltips.raceMode: All players can buzz — ranked by speed
tooltips.soloMode: Only the first player to buzz wins the round
tooltips.orderVisible: Players can see who buzzed and in what order
tooltips.orderHidden: Hide the buzz order from players
tooltips.inputOn: Player input is enabled — click to disable
tooltips.inputOff: Player input is disabled — click to enable
tooltips.clearTexts: Erase all player text fields at once
tooltips.teamsOn: Team mode is active — click to disable
tooltips.teamsOff: Enable team mode to group players into teams
tooltips.perPlayerSoundOn: Each player has their own buzz sound — click to use a single sound
tooltips.perPlayerSoundOff: All players share the same buzz sound — click for individual sounds
tooltips.copyPlayerLink: Copy the join link for players to your clipboard
tooltips.copySpectatorLink: Copy the spectator view link to your clipboard
tooltips.leaveRoom: Leave the room and return to the home screen
tooltips.scoreUp: Add one point to this player's score
tooltips.scoreDown: Remove one point from this player's score
tooltips.resetPlayer: Clear this player's text, buzzes, and answers
tooltips.kickPlayer: Remove this player from the room permanently
tooltips.testSound: Play a preview of this player's assigned buzz sound
tooltips.copyTakeoverLink: Generate a one-time link that lets someone take over this disconnected player's session
tooltips.confirmMc: Lock the options and show them to all players
tooltips.confirmSlider: Lock the range and show it to all players
tooltips.addTeam: Create a new team for players to join
tooltips.removeTeam: Delete this team and unassign its players
tooltips.kickSpectator: Remove this spectator from the room
tooltips.defaultSound: Choose the default buzz sound played for all players
tooltips.timer_off: No timer — Quiz Master controls rounds manually
tooltips.timer_not_enforced: Timer visible only to Quiz Master — does not block players
tooltips.timer_enforced: Timer must be running for players to buzz/answer
tooltips.timer_enforced_after_first: Timer auto-starts when first player buzzes or submits
